features.name: Search & Browse
features.description: Search bar on homepage, category grid with icons, city filter dropdown. Users can find services by keyword or browse categories.

features.name: Contact Forms
features.description: Per-service lead capture form with name, phone, email, description fields. Email notification to admin (SMTP-configured). Thank-you page after submission.

features.name: Professional Profiles
features.description: MVP slices complete: basic professional listing + profile pages + professional registration form submission. Next: photos/portfolio, moderation workflow, and listing profiles in homepage search results.

features.name: Reviews & Ratings
features.description: User review submission with star ratings (1-5). Display reviews on professional profiles. Review moderation. Verified review badges.

features.name: Booking System
features.description: Availability calendar for professionals. Booking flow: select service → pick date/time → confirm. Email confirmations to both parties.

features.name: Messaging
features.description: Chat between users and professionals. Message threads per inquiry. Notification system. Chat history.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin panel to manage listings, moderate reviews, view analytics, manage users. Protected routes with authentication.

features.name: Payment System
features.description: Booking deposits via Stripe. Professional subscription plans. Invoice generation. Payment history.

milestones.name: MVP Features
milestones.target: Search, contact forms, basic profiles working
